src: Modular Reinforcement Learning (RL) library (implemented in PyTorch, JAX, and NVIDIA Warp) with support for Gymnasium/Gym, NVIDIA Isaac Lab, MuJoCo Playground and other environments
ja: Gymnasium/Gym、NVIDIA Isaac Lab、MuJoCo Playgroundなどの環境に対応した、PyTorch・JAX・NVIDIA Warpで実装されたモジュール式強化学習（RL）ライブラリ。
